title: Nexus OutlinePatchChapterRequest
description: Request body for POST /v1/local/works/{work_id}/chapters/{chapter_id}/patch (V1.72). Edits chapter-level metadata exposed on the outline canvas.

work_id.description: Work identifier from the URL path. Must match the path parameter.

chapter_id.description: Chapter number from the URL path. Must match the path parameter.

base_revision.description: Revision observed by the client on the last canonical read.

set.description: Fields to update on the chapter. At least one property must be provided.
